reviews.comment: Frederick Window Tinting took wonderful care of me. I purchased an out of state car and needed the tint removed for registration. I’m actually glad the state made me remove the tint because now with the same percentage all the way around it looks even better.

reviews.name: accounts/114723450049664810853/locations/10123051285004451502/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURPc3REamdBRRAB

reviews.comment:
::UPDATE:: They installed everything perfectly, but because a very tiny couple edges started peeling along the edge of one of the pano sunroof glass after a month, they just upped and replaced it, no questions asked right there on the spot. Also removed my VA emissions due-by sticker for me. These guys rock. ::END UPDATE::

These guys are pros; the Chick-Fil-A of window tinting. Family atmosphere and professional too? Win-Win. The customer service in helping me to decide what windows to tint and how dark to go was amazing. Ended up going ~20% for all the windows. The process to schedule and have the car in the shop was also quick, friendly and communicative. Ended up doing all the windows except the windshield, including the Pano-Sunroof. Was concerned because of all the electronics and the potential for overspray during application, but everything was flawless.

Lastly, I went with the S9's heat rejection film which is the best heat dispersion available and it made a huge difference. Now I keep the sunshade open all the time on the entire pano-sunroof and my head is just as cool as the rest of the body.

Thanks Frederick Window Tinting.

reviewReply.comment: Chick Fil A sets the bar pretty high so we have some pretty big shoes to fill! We appreciate you!!

reviews.comment: AWESOME!  Honest.  Loyal.  Perfectionists.  I liked my Mustang when I rolled it off the lot, but I LOVED my Mustang when I rolled it off Frederick Window Tinting's lot!  I have entrusted all my vehicles including my commercial fleet with Frederick Window Tinting for the past 5 years.  You'll love them.  Truly a family run business, one that is grounded and trust worthy--which is a hard-to-find commodity these days!  Whether you have a beater commuter car, or a show quality garage kept piece of art, use Frederick Window Tinting.  You don't want anyone else touching your car.  And believe it or not, there is good tinting and bad tinting.  And you do not want to have the daily nuisance of dealing with bad tinting; and then to fight with some quick and sloppy shop about warranty work.  Bring it on over to Frederick Window Tinting and rest assured, it will be done right the first time! FIVE YEARS LATER.....STILL THE BEST WINDOW TINTING COMPANY IN THE WORLD!!!

reviewReply.comment: Thank you so much Brandon! We love when customers become family! You're the best!

reviews.comment: These are some of the nicest, down to earth people I’ve ever met. Straight forward, honest, good hearted people. We had a wonderful conversation while my truck was getting done. reviewReply.comment: We appreciate it Jason!! Thank you for coming in!
